fields.name: Skilled From Birth
fields.description: Can start with 3 dots in a single skill instead of the usual cap of 2.

fields.name: Sheer Grit
fields.description: Once per session, reroll any failed roll.

fields.name: Tactical Awareness
fields.description: Use an extra +1d for any roll once per combat.

fields.name: Resourceful
fields.description: Gain +1 downtime action for training, healing, or crafting.

fields.name: Sediment Body
fields.description: Can reshape into stone or pebbles, allowing stealth and terrain merging. Gain +1 effect regarding related rolls.

fields.name: Hardened Physique
fields.description: Gain 1 extra Stand Armor charge per scene.

fields.name: Rock Punches
fields.description: Unarmed attacks now deal Level 2 Harm.

fields.name: Camouflage
fields.description: If stationary, you can merge and move through stone.

fields.name: Mudshot
fields.description: Can fire hardened mud that immobilizes targets. Create a 3 tick clock.

fields.name: Tolerance
fields.description: The detrimental effects of larpintas are reduced.

fields.name: Bloodthirst
fields.description: You are capable of drinking anything through any appendage.

fields.name: Flight
fields.description: You are capable of flying and have a flying speed of 30ft/6 seconds.

fields.name: Nocturnal
fields.description: You are able to see in the dark up to 100ft. Outside of 100ft, treat darkness as dim light.

fields.name: Blood Puppeteer
fields.description: If you drink a person's blood, you can command them for 1 scene.

fields.name: Sunlight Immunity
fields.description: You are capable of surviving in sunlight.

fields.name: Mist Form
fields.description: Can turn into mist for the duration of the scene but cannot attack while in mist.

fields.name: Regeneration
fields.description: Can spend 1 stress to heal 1 segment of harm.

fields.name: Bat Form
fields.description: Can fly but must use 1 stress per scene to maintain it.

fields.name: Staying Power
fields.description: If you are overwhelmed with harm, a hit that will KO can be avoided by losing a limb. Your character can survive with separated limbs; you can control your detached limbs, but any damage done to them will destroy them, and any damage dealt to your head will KO you.

fields.name: Hyper-Intelligence
fields.description: Gain +1 effect on Insight-based actions once per scene.

fields.name: Superior Physiology
fields.description: +1d to resisting physical harm.

fields.name: Chainsaw Arm
fields.description: Gain a retractable bone chainsaw that deals Level 2 Harm.

fields.name: Weighted Feathers
fields.description: Gain a long-range attack dealing Level 2 Harm at 60ft.

fields.name: Life Absorption
fields.description: Can drain enemies to regain health.

fields.name: Body Modification
fields.description: Can reshape body mid-combat to escape grapples, squeeze through small spaces, or extend limbs.

fields.name: Perfect Organism
fields.description: Can create organic organisms through stress expenditure (1 for small entities, 3 for medium, 5 for large, 10 for huge).

fields.name: Shapechange
fields.description: Can morph into either organic or inanimate forms.

fields.name: Enhanced Senses
fields.description: Can detect movement in 360° around you. Gain +1 effect towards a related roll.

fields.name: Perfect Mimicry
fields.description: Can copy a person's voice and physical appearance.

fields.name: Blindsight
fields.description: Can sense movement even in total darkness.

fields.name: Reflex Overclock
fields.description: +1d to dodging attacks.

fields.name: No Vital Signs
fields.description: Immune to poison, disease, and biological scanners.

fields.name: Ghostly Aura
fields.description: You are harder to detect when in dim light or darkness. Gain +1 effect to a related roll.

fields.name: Ethereal Nature
fields.description: +1d when resisting mental attacks.

fields.name: Phase Through Objects
fields.description: Can pass through solid barriers for 1 scene.

fields.name: Poltergeist
fields.description: Can move small objects telekinetically.

fields.name: Fear Aura
fields.description: Enemies within 5ft must roll Resolve or hesitate.

fields.name: Resurrection
fields.description: Once per campaign, if killed, return as a more powerful entity.

fields.name: Mechanical Tool
fields.description: A mechanical weapon or utility item (binoculars, hammer, writing utensil, water filter, etc.) can be collapsed and built into your frame (close or long range); gain +1 effect towards any stealth related roll.

fields.name: Mechanical Limb
fields.description: A mechanical limb has been attached to your body, adding +1 effect to any athletics or attack based roll.

fields.name: Hidden Arsenal
fields.description: Gain a built-in weapon (e.g., energy blast, retractable blade) that deals Level 2 Harm.

fields.name: Enhanced Reflexes
fields.description: Once per scene, instantly dodge an attack.

fields.name: Optic Targeting
fields.description: +1d to all ranged attacks.

fields.name: Integrated Tools
fields.description: Built-in tools (lockpicks, scanners, welding torch) give +1d to Tinker actions.

fields.name: Precognitive Instinct
fields.description: Once per scene, ask the GM a yes/no question about the immediate future.

fields.name: Spiritual Awareness
fields.description: +1d when detecting supernatural forces (Stands, Hamon, bizarre entities).

fields.name: Danger Sense
fields.description: You always act first in combat.

fields.name: Divination
fields.description: Can "read" an object's past by touching it (GM discretion).

fields.name: Supernatural Resistance
fields.description: Once per scene, ignore a consequence from a supernatural source.

fields.name: Manifest Destiny
fields.description: Once per session, force a reroll on any fate-related check.
